home.title: The new digital home of Serbian tennis veterans
home.lead: Tournament calendar, live draws and results, rankings and player profiles — in one place, in Serbian and English.

sections.upcomingSub: Entries and draws for upcoming events.
sections.recentSub: Latest finished tournaments and their champions.

calendar.title: Tournament calendar
calendar.desc: Filter by series, system, discipline and city.

players.title: Player profiles
players.desc: Points, ranking movement, tournament history, head-to-head.

referee.title: Referee portal
referee.desc: Draws, schedule and result entry — optimized for on-court use.

common.notFoundDesc: The requested page does not exist or has been moved.
common.wipDesc: This part of the system is under construction and will be available soon.

calendar.title: Tournament calendar
calendar.subtitle: Upcoming tournaments and a results archive by year.
calendar.noUpcoming: No announced tournaments right now. See the archive below.
calendar.count: {n, plural, =0 {no tournaments} one {# tournament} other {# tournaments}}

tournament.eventsSub: Categories and disciplines within the tournament.
tournament.noEvents: Events have not been defined yet.

entry.title: Enter this tournament
entry.loginTitle: Sign in to enter this tournament
entry.loginBody: Your account links automatically to your player profile.
entry.noPlayer: Your account isn't linked to a player profile.
entry.lead: One tap, right from the page. Events matching your profile are highlighted.
entry.count: {n, plural, =0 {no entries yet} one {# entry} other {# entries}}
entry.singlesOnly: Self-entry applies to singles. Doubles and mixed are handled by the tournament director.
entry.acceptanceEmpty: No entries yet — be the first.

tournament.soon: Draws, schedule and results will be available once the director opens the tournament (referee portal — Phase 3).

auth.title: Sign in
auth.intro: No password needed — enter your email address and we'll send you a sign-in link. Clicking the link signs you in.
auth.noPassword: First time? Same process — if your email is in the member database, your account is automatically linked to your player profile.
auth.sentBody: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Open the message and click the link.
auth.sentHint: The message may land in Promotions/Spam. The link expires after a while — if it does, request a new one.
auth.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.errorLimit: Too many attempts — please wait a bit and try again.
auth.errorSend: Sending failed. Please try again in a minute.
auth.errorLink: The link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
auth.helpBody: If your email isn't in the member database or you're stuck, contact your club coordinator — they can also enter tournaments on your behalf.

account.title: My account
account.linkedSuccess: Your account is linked to your player profile.
account.pickBody: This email is linked to the following players in our records. Pick your profile.
account.noMatchTitle: Email not found in the member database
account.noMatchBody: Your account is active but not linked to any player. If you are a TVS member, ask your coordinator to update your email in the records.
account.errorTaken: That player is already linked to another account. If this is a mistake, contact your coordinator.
account.errorClaim: Linking failed. Please try again or contact your coordinator.
account.catCardBody: Request a change of your quality category. The coordinator makes the decision.
account.catReqSent: Your category change request has been sent.

catErr.vecPodnet: You already have a pending request.
catErr.nemaIgraca: Account is not linked to a player.
catErr.kategorija: Sending the request failed. Please try again.

coordinator.title: Coordinator panel
coordinator.subtitle: Tournaments, user roles and the corrections audit trail. For coordinators and administrators.
coordinator.usersHint: Roles are managed by the technical admin.
coordinator.usersHintAdmin: Click a role to grant/revoke it (green = granted).
coordinator.scoringTablesLead: Edit point values by round reached (model: classic).
coordinator.scoringModelKlasicni: Model: classic (progression). Values are points by round reached; “consolation” = loss in the 1st round.
coordinator.scoringModelSviBoduju: Model: “everyone scores” (Masters-style). Points = placement (winner/final/semifinal) + each group win; a participant without a win gets fixed points. “Reserve” is not calculated automatically. Values do not depend on the draw size.
coordinator.categoryRequestsHint: Players request a change of quality category; your decision is final.
coordinator.rankingsHint: Rankings are recalculated automatically every Monday at 03:00 (points older than 52 weeks drop off). Run a recalculation now if needed.

err.samoodbrana: You cannot revoke your own admin role.
err.vec_ima: The user already has that role.
err.direktor: Director not uniquely found — enter a more precise name.
err.postoji: A tournament with that name already exists for that year.
err.klubPostoji: A club with that name already exists.
err.dupNalog: The duplicate has a linked account — unlink it first (contact the admin).

clubs.title: Clubs
clubs.lead: Add clubs and cities (city auto-fills Place on tournaments).
clubs.name: Club name
clubs.cityHint: The city is used to auto-fill Place when creating tournaments.

members.title: Members
members.lead: New players and guests + notifications to all members.
members.newHint: Guest = a player who is not an association member (can play, not a member).
members.emailHint: Copy the addresses and paste them into the BCC field of your email client. Direct sending from the site comes with custom SMTP.
members.searchPlaceholder: Search by first and last name…
members.mergeHint: Everything (matches, points, entries, payments) moves to the kept player; the duplicate is deleted. Irreversible.

coordinator.noActiveTournaments: No active or upcoming tournaments — create one above.

referee.title: Referee portal
referee.subtitle: Tournament management — draw, result entry, publishing. For tournament directors and coordinators.
referee.loginNeeded: To access the referee portal, sign in with an account linked to your player profile (tournament director) or with coordinator rights.
referee.noTournaments: Your account currently manages no tournaments. If you are a tournament director, make sure your account is linked to your player profile (My account) or contact the coordinator.
referee.entriesCount: {n, plural, =0 {no entries} one {# entry} other {# entries}}
referee.needEntries: A draw requires at least 3 entries in this event.
referee.correctionsHint: Clearing is possible only while the next match is unresolved. All corrections are audited.
referee.reopenConfirm: I confirm — this tournament's points are deleted and rankings recalculated
referee.noCandidates: No players match (or all are already entered).
referee.finishBody: Finishes the tournament and awards points to all players by round reached (scoring table by series and draw size). Points feed the rankings. Post-finish corrections are done by the coordinator.
referee.finishConfirm: I confirm — all results are entered correctly
referee.finishBlocked: Available once all draws are published and all matches resolved (no working draws).
referee.finished: The tournament is finished — points calculated and rankings updated.

ok.kreiran: Working draw created. Review it, then publish.
ok.objavljen: The draw is published and visible on the public tournament page.
ok.rezultat: Result saved — the winner advanced to the next round.
ok.zavrsen: The tournament is finished — points calculated and rankings updated.
ok.zavrsenBezVesti: The tournament is finished and points calculated, but the automatic news report was NOT published — publish it manually in the coordinator panel (News).
ok.opozvan: Draw revoked (audited). You can now redraw.
ok.otvoren: Tournament reopened — points deleted, rankings recalculated.
ok.premestaj: Player moved to another event (seeding points recalculated).

err.confirm_required: Tick the confirmation before finishing the tournament.
err.forbidden: You are not allowed to finish this tournament.
err.working_draw_exists: There is a working (unpublished) draw — publish or discard it.
err.unresolved_matches: All matches must be resolved before finishing.
err.missing_scoring_cell: The scoring table is missing a value for this series/draw size/round — fill it in the coordinator panel (Scoring tables) and try again.
err.not_published: The draw is not published — no revoke needed.
err.tournament_finished: The tournament is finished — reopen it first.
err.match_unresolved: The match has no result entered.
err.bye_match: A bye match has no result to clear.
err.downstream_resolved: Not possible — the winner already played the next match. Clear that result first.
err.already_entered: The player is already entered in that event.
err.swap_elimination_only: Position swap works only for elimination draws (redraw for groups).
err.not_enough_entries: Not enough entries for a draw (minimum 3).
err.draw_published: The draw is already published — revoking is done by the coordinator.
err.not_working_draw: The draw is not in working status.
err.match_resolved: This match is already resolved — corrections are done by the coordinator.
err.match_incomplete: The match does not have both participants yet.
err.sets_required: For a completed match enter the score by sets (e.g. 6:3 7:5).
err.seed_taken: That seed number is already assigned to another player.

referee.noEventsYet: This tournament has no events yet — add them below (“New event”), then enter player entries per category.
referee.seedHint: Seed (manual) — empty = automatic by points at draw time

players.title: Players
players.subtitle: Member directory — search by name and category.
players.searchPlaceholder: Search by first or last name…
players.count: {n, plural, =0 {no players} one {# player} other {# players}}
players.empty: No results for the selected filters.

profile.noRanking: Ranking has not been calculated for this player yet.
profile.rankingRow: {bodovi} points · {turnira, plural, one {# tournament} other {# tournaments}}

rankings.title: Rankings
rankings.subtitle: Quality categories (I–V) by discipline. Sum of N best results over the last 52 weeks.
rankings.empty: The ranking for this category and discipline has not been calculated yet. It will appear after the first tournaments are played or existing data is migrated.
